## File: scripts/plugins.toml
````toml
# Plugin build configuration
# Used by: cargo run -p plugin-build -- package

cdn_base_url = "https://cdn.appz.dev/plugins/v1"

# S3/R2 configuration (optional - use env vars for CI)
# s3_bucket = "appz-plugins"
# s3_region = "auto"
# s3_endpoint = "https://<account_id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com"

[[plugins]]
crate_name = "check-plugin"
plugin_id = "check"
name = "Check"
description = "Check code for errors, lint issues, formatting, and secrets"
tier = "free"
commands = ["check"]
min_cli_version = "0.1.0"

[[plugins]]
crate_name = "ssg-migrator-plugin"
plugin_id = "ssg-migrator"
name = "SSG Migrator"
description = "Migrate React SPA to Astro or Next.js; convert files to Astro/Next.js"
tier = "free"
commands = ["migrate", "convert"]
min_cli_version = "0.1.0"

[[plugins]]
crate_name = "site-plugin"
plugin_id = "site"
name = "Site"
description = "AI-powered website creation, redesign, and cloning"
tier = "pro"
commands = ["site"]
min_cli_version = "0.1.0"
````

## File: run.sh
````bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Run appz-cli from anywhere
# Usage: ./run.sh [args...]
# Alias: alias appz='/home/avihs/projects/appz-cli/run.sh'

CWD="$(pwd)"
cd /home/avihs/workspace/appz-cli && cargo run --package cli --quiet -- --cwd "$CWD" "$@"
````

name = "checker"

[features]
default = ["full"]

# Build with all bundled modules. Plugin-only features (check, site)
# are excluded — those plugins work via the External command handler.
# Note: migrate has been removed entirely — the ssg-migrator plugin is
# self-contained and no longer needs host-side migration code.
full = ["dev-server", "deploy", "mcp", "gen", "self_update"]

# Individual feature flags — forwarded to the `app` crate.
dev-server = ["app/dev-server"]
deploy = ["app/deploy"]
check = ["app/check"]
site = ["app/site"]
mcp = ["app/mcp"]
gen = ["app/gen"]
self_update = ["app/self_update"]
````

## File: crates/sandbox/src/scoped_fs.rs
````rust
//! Path-scoped filesystem operations — the sandbox security boundary.
//!
⋮----
//!
//! [`ScopedFs`] ensures that **every** filesystem path is resolved relative to
⋮----
//! [`ScopedFs`] ensures that **every** filesystem path is resolved relative to
//! a sandbox root directory and validated before any I/O occurs. This prevents
⋮----
//! a sandbox root directory and validated before any I/O occurs. This prevents
//! path traversal attacks (e.g. `../../etc/passwd`) and accidental writes
⋮----
//! path traversal attacks (e.g. `../../etc/passwd`) and accidental writes
//! outside the project.
⋮----
//! outside the project.
//!
⋮----
//!
//! # Security guarantees
⋮----
//! # Security guarantees
//!
⋮----
//!
//! - **Absolute paths** are rejected immediately (`PathEscape` error).
⋮----
//! - **Absolute paths** are rejected immediately (`PathEscape` error).
//! - **`..` traversal** that escapes the root is rejected.
⋮----
//! - **`..` traversal** that escapes the root is rejected.

⋮----

//!   the root, the operation is rejected.

⋮----

//! synchronous and straightforward. Batch operations (`read_files`,
⋮----
//! synchronous and straightforward. Batch operations (`read_files`,

⋮----

//! Check command implementation.
//!
⋮----
//!
//! Orchestrates the check flow:
⋮----
//! Orchestrates the check flow:
//! 1. Create a sandbox for the project directory.
⋮----
//! 1. Create a sandbox for the project directory.
//! 2. Load check configuration from appz.json.
⋮----
//! 2. Load check configuration from appz.json.
//! 3. Optionally filter files via git (--changed / --staged).
⋮----
//! 3. Optionally filter files via git (--changed / --staged).

## File: crates/ssg-migrator/Cargo.toml
````toml
[package]
name = "ssg-migrator"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
publish = false

[features]
default = ["native"]
# Native mode: adds walkdir, git2, ast-grep for the NativeFs implementation
# and full AST-based transformations.
native = [
    "dep:walkdir",
    "dep:git2",
    "dep:ast-grep-core",
    "dep:ast-grep-language",
]

[dependencies]
# Core dependencies (always compiled)
serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = { workspace = true }
miette = { workspace = true }
thiserror = { workspace = true }
regex = { workspace = true }
camino = "1.2"

# Biome parsing crates — pure Rust, compile to both native and WASM.
biome_js_parser = { path = "../../../code-ref/biome/crates/biome_js_parser" }
biome_js_syntax = { path = "../../../code-ref/biome/crates/biome_js_syntax" }
biome_rowan = { path = "../../../code-ref/biome/crates/biome_rowan" }

# Native-only dependencies
walkdir = { version = "2", optional = true }
git2 = { version = "0.19", optional = true }
ast-grep-core = { version = "0.39.7", optional = true }
ast-grep-language = { version = "0.39.7", optional = true }
````

## File: crates/app/Cargo.toml
````toml
[package]
name = "app"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
publish = false

[dependencies]
clap = { workspace = true }
miette = { workspace = true }
serde = { workspace = true }
serde_json = { workspace = true }
serde_yaml = { workspace = true }
inquire = { workspace = true }
which = { workspace = true }
shell-words = { workspace = true }
starbase_utils = { workspace = true }
chrono = { workspace = true }
regex = { workspace = true }
itertools = "0.13"
walkdir = "2"
task = { path = "../task" }
command = { path = "../command" }
frameworks = { path = "../frameworks" }
env_var = { path = "../env_var" }
async-trait = "0.1"
tokio = { workspace = true, features = ["process"] }
tokio-util = { workspace = true }
futures = { workspace = true }
extism = { workspace = true }
thiserror = { workspace = true }
reqwest = { workspace = true, features = ["json", "gzip", "zstd", "blocking"] }
ssh = { package = "ssh-rs", workspace = true }
starbase = "0.10"
starbase_styles = "0.6"
starbase_events = "0.7"
starbase_shell = "0.10"
tracing = "0.1"
api = { path = "../api" }
ui = { path = "../ui" }
common = { path = "../common" }
atty = { workspace = true }
starbase_archive = { workspace = true }
tempfile = { workspace = true }
tokio-retry = { workspace = true }
url = { workspace = true }
indicatif = { workspace = true }
self_update = { workspace = true, optional = true }
webbrowser = "1.0"
toml = "0.8"
camino = "1.2"
sandbox = { path = "../sandbox" }
plugin-manager = { path = "../plugin-manager" }
init = { path = "../init" }

# Optional heavy dependencies — gated behind feature flags so the core CLI
# can be kept small as an orchestration / delegator tool.
dev-server = { path = "../dev-server", optional = true }
deployer = { path = "../deployer", optional = true }
checker = { path = "../checker", optional = true }
site-builder = { path = "../site-builder", optional = true }
appz-studio = { path = "../studio", optional = true }
mcp-server = { path = "../mcp-server", optional = true }
[features]
default = ["self_update", "dev-server", "deploy", "mcp", "gen"]

# Bundled dev server (appz dev-server, appz preview)
dev-server = ["dep:dev-server"]

# Third-party deployment providers (appz deploy, deploy-init, deploy-list)
deploy = ["dep:deployer"]

# Code quality checker (plugin host function for appz check)
check = ["dep:checker"]

# AI-powered site builder (plugin host function for appz site)
site = ["dep:site-builder"]

# MCP protocol server for AI assistants (appz mcp-server)
mcp = ["dep:mcp-server"]

# AI website generation (appz gen)
gen = ["dep:appz-studio"]
````

## File: Cargo.toml
````toml
[workspace]
members = [
    "crates/app",
    "crates/mcp-server",
    "crates/ai",
    "crates/api",
    "crates/cli",
    "crates/command",
    "crates/common",
    "crates/dev-server",
    "crates/env_var",
    "crates/frameworks",
    "crates/ssg-migrator",
    "crates/task",
    "crates/ui",
    "crates/appz_pdk", 
    "crates/studio",
    "crates/sandbox",
    "crates/deployer",
    "crates/checker",
    "crates/init",
    "crates/site-builder",
    "crates/plugin-manager",
    "crates/plugins/ssg-migrator",
    "crates/plugins/check",
    "crates/plugins/site",
    "crates/plugin-build",
]
resolver = "2"

[package]
name = "appz"
version.workspace = true
edition.workspace = true
license.workspace = true
authors.workspace = true
publish = false

[[bin]]
name = "appz"
path = "crates/cli/src/main.rs"

[dependencies]
app = { path = "crates/app", default-features = false }
common = { path = "crates/common" }
ui = { path = "crates/ui" }
env_var = { path = "crates/env_var" }
plugin-manager = { path = "crates/plugin-manager" }
sandbox = { path = "crates/sandbox" }
api = { path = "crates/api" }
clap = { workspace = true }
miette = { workspace = true }
serde_json = { workspace = true }
starbase = "0.10"
starbase_styles = "0.6"
starbase_utils = { workspace = true }
tokio = { workspace = true }
tracing = "0.1"

[features]
default = ["full"]

# Build with all bundled modules. Plugin-only features (check, site)
# are excluded — those plugins work via the External command handler.
# Note: migrate has been removed entirely — the ssg-migrator plugin is
# self-contained and no longer needs host-side migration code.
full = ["dev-server", "deploy", "mcp", "gen", "self_update"]

# Individual feature flags — forwarded to the `app` crate.
dev-server = ["app/dev-server"]
deploy = ["app/deploy"]
check = ["app/check"]
site = ["app/site"]
mcp = ["app/mcp"]
gen = ["app/gen"]
self_update = ["app/self_update"]

[workspace.package]
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"
license = "MIT"
authors = ["Appz Contributors"]

[workspace.dependencies]
# Core dependencies
serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1.0"
serde_yaml = "0.9"
miette = { version = "7.0", features = ["fancy"] }
thiserror = "1.0"
tokio = { version = "1.0", features = ["full"] }
tokio-util = { version = "0.7", features = ["full"] }
futures = "0.3"
futures-util = "0.3"

# CLI and UI
clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }
inquire = "0.7"
indicatif = "0.17"
atty = "0.2"
shell-words = "1.1"
which = "6.0"

# Utilities
regex = "1.10"
rustc-hash = "1.1"
chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
starbase_utils = { version = "0.10", features = ["json"] }
starbase_archive = { version = "0.12.0", features = ["zip-all"] }
tempfile = "3.10"
tokio-retry = "0.3"
url = "2.5"
urlencoding = "2.1"

# HTTP and networking
reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = ["json", "gzip", "zstd", "blocking", "stream"] }
hyper = "1.3"
hyper-util = { version = "0.1", features = ["full"] }
http-body-util = "0.1"
notify = "6.1"
mime_guess = "2.0"
multer = "3.0"
tokio-tungstenite = "0.24"

# WASM and plugins
extism = "1.0"

# SSH
ssh = { package = "ssh-rs", version = "0.5.0" }

# Randomness
rand = "0.8"

# Config
toml = "0.8"

# Concurrency
scc = "2.1"

# Self-update
self_update = { version = "0.42", default-features = false, features = ["rustls", "signatures"] }

# MCP
rmcp = { version = "0.15", default-features = false, features = ["server", "transport-io", "schemars", "macros"] }
````
